entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
Hi William, you are right it works if I put shellMode before S2 instruction :

https://xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/app.html#/story2?shellMode=embed&/s2/storyID

 

thanks

entry.title: Configure cTMS in combination with CHARM and CI/CD
entry.content:
Introduction

The BTP Cloud Transport Management Service (cTMS) is mostly used in combination with the CI/CD service (or any other non-SAP CI/CD tool) when you need to transport applications from one Sub Account to another Sub Account. This combination is well documented in the SAP help documentation. CI/CD deploys to your DEV Sub Account and uploads the MTAR of your application to cTMS. From here, cTMS taks over to deploy to ACC and PRD Sub Accounts. You can find the details in the documentation here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/continuous-integration-and-delivery/sap-continuous-integration-and-delivery/configure-sap-fiori-in-cloud-foundry-environment-job-in-your-repository#(optional)-integrate-sap-cloud-transport-management-into-your-pipeline

 

Besides integration with CI/CD, you want to integrate cTMS with your existing transporting system, which is for most customers Charm. This setup allows you to transport ABAP objects and BTP applications together. You could also consider using ALM as transporting system but at the moment this has not all the functionalities that you have in Charm today.

Connecting cTMS nodes to Charm require enabling the configuration “Controlled By SAP Solution Manager”:

When you enable this, you might face some of the problems listed below and the solution might might be helping you to have a clean cTMS landscape integrated with Charm.

Problems

  • DEV node in cTMS without destination cannot be saved

  • Setting a destination doesn’t make sense as the CI/CD service already deploys to the DEV Sub Account but it allows you to continue with the configuration. 
  • The flow described for Cloud ALM cannot be applied exactly the same way when using Charm as it does not require to enable “Controlled by SAP Solution Manager”, see documentation. 
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/cloud-transport-management

  • All cTMS Nodes after DEV need to be controller by SAP Solution Manager if you want to integrate it with Charm BUT import to cTMS Nodes “Controlled By SAP Solution Manager” is not possible. This will cause an error in the logs of cTMS 

  • Uploading to the DEV Node in cTMS only forwards to ACC after successful import. Importing/Deploying to DEV via cTMS is not needed as this is already done by the CI/CD service
    • This is only causing overhead which is not needed
  • This means that you need to upload to cTMS Node for ACC BTP Sub Account BUT this is not possible because it is controlled by SAP Solution Manager

Solution

  • Make the DEV nodea Virtual Node
  • In SAP CI/CD, use export from “DEV-NODE” instead of "Upload to":
    • This will upload the mtar to cTMS and immediately forward it from DEV to ACC so it ends up in the queue of ACC.

 

  • In any other CI/CD tool, use the export api: “/v2/nodes/export”
    • https://api.sap.com/api/TMS_v2/path/NODE_EXPORT_BY_NAME_V2
    • See blog post with an example: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integrate-ci-cd-with-ctms-as-part-of-sap-cloud-alm/ba-p/13653010 

In the end, DEV is a virtual node and all others are controlled by Solution Manager

Configuration of the DEV Node:

  • Upload to Node is allowed
  • Node is flagged as a virtual node

 

Configuration of all nodes after DEV:

  • “Conntrolled By SAP Solution Manager” enabled

 

Overview

In the end, your transport landscape with CI/CD, cTMS and Charm will look like this:

  • Developers will push their code from BAS or VSCode to GIT
  • GIT will trigger CI/CD through a webhook
  • CI/CD will
    • deploy to the DEV Sub Account
    • export to cTMS dev node
  • cTMS will move the transport to the queue of ACC
  • From here it can be transported using Charm

I used a separate Sub Account for the CI/CD service but this could be as well in the DEV Sub Account.

For the integration with Charm I recommend following this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-the-integration-of-sap-cloud-platform-transport-management-into/ba-p/13443259

entry.title: Re: Re-Recording in Producer
entry.content:
Hi,

I think it will be much faster to re-record the Simulations again with the correct screensize.  Attempting to manually adjust the size of images and the location of hotspots will take way longer than just recording again.

Regards
Shane

Thanks

Gustaf

entry.title: Re: Cannot generate a PDF after latest Microsoft Office u...
entry.content:
Hi Ankur,

Generation of documentation only works for Enable Now when Office 365 is installed on the authoring PC; not the browser version of the application.  I suspect that you are trying to generate documentation with a cloud version of Office 365.  The following details are in the Enable Now requirements document.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub H1 2024 Release Insights
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors continues to set the bar high with its first half of 2024 release, particularly in the Talent Intelligence Hub and Succession & Development. This release packs exciting new features and essential updates that will transform how organisations manage and develop their workforce. Here’s an integrated overview of what’s new and noteworthy, with my insights and view

AI-Assisted Skills Architecture Creation: A Game Changer

The new AI-assisted skills architecture creation tool is a standout feature that addresses a significant challenge many organizations face: starting a skill library from scratch. This tool leverages AI to analyse job role data and automatically suggests a relevant skills library, making it easier for organizations to initiate their journey with the Talent Intelligence Hub.

Key Points:
- Automated Skill Mapping: The tool focuses on job role description fields to determine necessary skills, streamlining the process of building a comprehensive skills library.
- AI Unit Requirement: Access to this feature requires licensed AI units, ensuring that only premium users benefit from this advanced capability.
- Industry-Specific Insights: Initially supporting a range of industries like software, manufacturing, and general business, SAP plans to expand its coverage, enhancing the tool's relevance across more sectors.

For those looking for a more tailored approach, TalenTeam’s TalentBox and Talent Intelligence Hub Accelerator offers personalized services to generate an AI-driven skills library that matches specific industry needs.

NextGen Career Development: Integrated and Intuitive

The integration of the Growth Portfolio with Career Development and the Opportunity Marketplace is a significant enhancement. It brings a holistic view of career opportunities directly within the Growth Portfolio, enabling users to see targeted roles, understand skill gaps, and access role-readiness assessments seamlessly.

Enhancements Include:
- Role and Opportunity Insights: Direct integration allows users to view role-specific insights and growth opportunities without navigating away from their current workflow.
- Opportunity Marketplace Integration: Users with access to the Opportunity Marketplace will see tailored recommendations, further personalizing their development experience.

In one of the sessions last year at SuccessConnect, the SAP Product managers mentioned that a user shouldn't need to go to a module to access information. Any SF module should present the right information to the user in the screen that they are in - this seems to bring that to life!

 

Streamlining Upgrades with New Tools

Upgrading from Centre of Capabilities to Growth Portfolio still remains a challenging process for many. The latest release introduces new tools and functionalities to ease this transition:
- Check Tool Updates: New tools address common upgrade issues, such as invalid skills and competencies and job family mismatches in the Job Description Manager, offering quick fixes to streamline the upgrade process.
- Enhanced Reporting Capabilities: This release also expands the reporting functionalities, allowing users to export competencies and skills from the Talent Intelligence Hub for enhanced data analysis and decision-making.

Report Stories

With this release, you can now export the Competencies and Skills available for reporting in conjunction with Job Profile Builder data, so we can report on all skills and
competencies mapped to specific roles

The 1H 2024 release of SAP SuccessFactors marks a significant step forward towards management of talent, leveraging advanced AI technologies and integration to enhance user experience and organizational efficiency. These tools will help organizations with a speedier path to a skills based organizations. As SAP continues to evolve, these enhancements are set to offer organizations the tools they need to thrive in an increasingly competitive business landscape.

entry.title: Re: What is the purpose of the Lesson Types in the Course...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you specify specific Simulation modes in an Assignment, only those modes are shown in the Learners View for the corresponding users.  In the image below, I created an Assignment that shows only Books and Demo Mode Simulations.

 If you open an actual Simulation, by clicking on a Simulation object, not the Demo Mode object, the Simulation view is shown and the user can access the other modes of the Simulation.  However, the Assignment only shows direct access and reporting of the Demo Mode Simulation to the user.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Posting not possible; new Asset Accounting is inconsi...
entry.content: In this case, please proceed by executing the transaction code FAA_do_activation.

entry.title: Re: Ability to override display settings?
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

Unfortunately not.  The Zoom settings that you mention are set at a Workarea level can cannot be modified for individual Books or Book Pages.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Is it possible, to hide a slide with macro actions fr...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, this is possible.  To do this, open your Simulation in Producer, click on the embedded Book Page object, and modify the properties of the Book Page so that they look like the image below.

 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Query with Parameter failing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on a complex query in SAP Business One that uses subqueries. However, I'm encountering an error when trying to use a dynamic parameter.

The query works perfectly when:

  • The parameter is hardcoded.

The problem arises when:

  • I try to make the parameter dynamic using the HANA syntax [%0].

Here's the working query (without the dynamic parameter):


SELECT
MFC."StartDate",
MFC."EndDate",
MFC."ForecastName",
T1."CardCode" AS "Business Partner Code",
T1."CardName" AS "Business Partner Name",
T2."U_Brand" AS "Brand",
MFC."ItemCode" AS "ItemCode",
MFC."Date" AS "Day Forecast",
MFC."ForecastQTY" AS "Forecast QTY",
MFC."SaleDate" AS "Invoice Date",
T3."Name" AS "Bill-to Country",
OTER."descript" AS "Territory",
T4."IndName" AS "Industry",
T5."GroupName" AS "Group",
T6."SlpName" AS "Sales Manager",
'' AS "Warehouse", -- leaving blank for now until we forecast by warehouse
T2."ItemName",
T1."Currency" AS "BP Currency", -- Business partner currency
MFC."Sales Value GBP" AS "Line Total GBP",
MFC."SoldQTY" AS "Invoice QTY"
FROM
(
SELECT
T0."U_BPCode" AS "CardCode",
T0."Code" AS "ForecastName",
T0."StartDate",
T0."EndDate",
T1."ItemCode",
T1."Date",
T1."Quantity" AS "ForecastQTY",
TSD."SaleDate",
TSD."QuantitySold" AS "SoldQTY",
TSD."Sales Value GBP"
FROM
DEV_SADP.OFCT T0
INNER JOIN DEV_SADP.FCT1 T1 ON T0."AbsID" = T1."AbsID"
LEFT JOIN
(
-- Sum up Sales Data
SELECT
SCT."CardCode",
SCT."ItemCode",
SCT."SaleDate",
SUM(SCT."QTYSold") AS "QuantitySold",
SUM(SCT."GBPSalesValue") AS "Sales Value GBP"
FROM
(
SELECT
T0."CardCode",
ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1) AS "SaleDate",
T1."ItemCode",
SUM(T1."Quantity") AS "QTYSold",
SUM(T1."LineTotal") AS "GBPSalesValue"
FROM
OINV T0
INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
WHERE
T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
GROUP BY
T0."CardCode",
ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1),
T1."ItemCode"
UNION ALL
SELECT
T0."CardCode",
ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1) AS "SaleDate",
T1."ItemCode",
SUM(T1."Quantity") * -1 AS "QTYSold",
SUM(T1."LineTotal") * -1 AS "GBPSalesValue"
FROM
ORIN T0
INNER JOIN RIN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
WHERE
T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
GROUP BY
T0."CardCode",
ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1),
T1."ItemCode"
) AS SCT
GROUP BY
SCT."CardCode",
SCT."ItemCode",
SCT."SaleDate"
) TSD ON T0."U_BPCode" = TSD."CardCode" AND T1."Date" = TSD."SaleDate" AND T1."ItemCode" = TSD."ItemCode"
) MFC
LEFT JOIN "OCRD" T1 ON MFC."CardCode" = T1."CardCode"
LEFT JOIN "OITM" T2 ON MFC."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN "OCRY" T3 ON T1."Country" = T3."Code"
LEFT JOIN "OTER" ON T1."Territory" = OTER."territryID"
LEFT JOIN "OOND" T4 ON T1."IndustryC" = T4."IndCode"
LEFT JOIN "OCRG" T5 ON T1."GroupCode" = T5."GroupCode"
LEFT JOIN "OSLP" T6 ON T1."SlpCode" = T6."SlpCode"
LEFT JOIN "OTER" TERPAR ON OTER."parent" = TERPAR."territryID";

 

 

 

Thanks

 

#sbo #query #parameter

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS TRANSACTION IN SAP S/4HANA CLOUD, PUBLIC EDI...

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS TRANSACTION IN SAP S/4HANA CLOUD, PUBLIC EDI...

Business transaction field is grayed and cannot be edited/change same with the account types allowed.

entry.title: Re: Brief Introduction to Machine Learning capabilities in SAP S/4HANA

Hi, This article addresses ML/AI support for S4. How much of these can work with ECC?

Thanks  - ravi

entry.title: Re: Execute a program in Particular App server
entry.content: Try report /SDF/PARAM with parameter status ='A'. This report can read all parameters from all application servers which are not changed dynamic via RZ11.

entry.title: User Access Review
entry.content:
Trying to make sure that I understand this tool.
1. Is this tool in the LMS and scheduled by an LMS Administrator?

2. Is this available at a cost?

3. Can this tool be used for quarterly audits of user roles/permissions?

4. Do I need to create user groups to use this tool to perform the audit?

entry.title: Re: Edit Error CKBK009
entry.content: hi @Rupesh_brahmankar3

entry.title: Re: BOM allocation
entry.content:
CS07 will not create a new internal BOM number, instead just use the existing BOM number.

CS01 will create a new BOM number.

entry.title: Re: SAP MAXDB : Content Server Administration - Repositor...
entry.content: If the parameter is not set, it can be understood as Default. Thank you for the clear answer. Have a good day.

entry.content: 可以在委外信息记录里维护生产版本

entry.title: Re: VAKEY operation used in PCR to refers to custom ABAP...
entry.content:
1 - For any Payroll related query, it could be helpful to provide the Country code since some Payroll Functions and Operations differ from one Country code to an other.

2 - Without looking in the system, I would think that the variable key BONUS and BONU1 are custom code.

entry.title: Database connection error from MTX Sidecar in hyrid mode
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I am running the bookshop sample in hybrid mode. I have setup the bindings correctly. First I startup the bookshop saas application, then I start the mtx/sidecar. I see that hana database is already created in Hana DB Explorer. But when I start the mtx/sidecar, I see the following error consistently. 

[hana] - Error: Could not establish connection for tenant "t0" due to error: Could not connect to any host: [ 44e1619f-2b20-495d-b6d8-6fe9ecec0e94.hana.prod-eu10.hanacloud.ondemand.com:443 - Client network socket disconnected before secure TLS connection was established ]
at couldNotOpenConnectionError (/Users/i532882/go/src/github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples/node_modules/hdb/lib/protocol/ConnectionManager.js:121:13)
at tryConnect (/Users/i532882/go/src/github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples/node_modules/hdb/lib/protocol/ConnectionManager.js:36:17)

Any idea what could be causing this?

Thanks,

Vikram

entry.title: Administrator Audit
entry.content:
Is there a report that I can run that will detail all users with Admin roles and / or permissions? Need to perform an audit to identify how many users have admin permissions, the last time they used them - anything that would help me make a determination on whether the user should be able to keep that unchanged access.

Open to ideas of how to create a manual annual auditing process and best practices on role management. Like should I create a User Group and add all the Super Admins. Create another User Group and all all the eDevelopers to it. I was thinking it would be easier to assign training to User Groups for new training released surrounding their role. Or sending out an annual attestation learning item, possibly different to each User Group.

Open to ideas!

entry.title: How to Mass Upload Stock Transfer Order
entry.content:
There is no Stock Transfer Order template to be uploaded for the Backlog Entry. The customer wants it due to the large item number in one transaction
and I can't find it on the data migration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Mass Upload Stock Transfer Order
entry.content:
Currently ByDesign doesn't support migration of stock transfer order. 

There is a standard web service ManageCustomerRequirementIn can be used to create intra company stock transfer orders. Please check whether this interface can fulfill your requirement.

Alternatively, we recommend you to post your query in SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 so that our development can look into it. Please note you may search it firstly and if it is not found, please register your requirement for this new feature.

Other customers can then vote for it, which will assert its legitimacy as a standard feature by showing the industry need and in turn influence the implementation schedule of the requirement.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible, to hide a slide with macro actions fr...
entry.content:
If you mean you have a Book Page then yes, as Shane explains. 

If you mean a simulation Step, then no, not without using a Jump to Step macro - what's your aversion to using that? Even if you set the Demo Mode Display Duration to 0 it will still flash up briefly...

entry.title: Re: Rounding component values in a production order
entry.content:
Firstly, you should consider to change the UoM configuration in background configuration.

Transaction is CUNI, remove the Decimal Rounding, just keep this filed as 0, because there is no decimal in your actual business for this UoM.

Secondly, in your business, maybe 5 finished products should use 1 bag (Component)，and for the other component Qty : the finished product Qty is 1:1.

As the requirement, we can change the BOM "Base quantity" into 5.

And set the quantity of bag = 1, and the other components Qty = 5.

I hope it can solve your problem, thank you.

entry.title: Re: Not able to open solman_setup tcode
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue

entry.title: Re: Certificate which I am looking forward to complete is not available on SAP now

entry.title: Vendor Grouping key not work
entry.content:
Hi All,

I try to using vendor grouping key to combine different vendor invoice(different vendor code) into a single payment document. But it is not work as expected. I try to use company code, fiscal year and payment method as the grouping key. And I checked from the payment proposal, seems it is correct. But two payment documents have been created in the payment list. What I want is only one single payment document. Since I need to pay to multiple bank account, so I won't use alternative payee method.

entry.title: Re: Mobile user login tracking
entry.content: To the best of my knowledge, it is not possible. We wanted to have matrics on mobile adoption and suh data will be great. However, then we were told it is not available. Happy to be proven wrong 🙂

entry.title: Replication is required between MaxDB DMS OnPrem and MaxDB DMS on Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Concerned,

Our document management system is running on the MaxDB 7.6 database on-premises. Now we have installed same size DMS system on AWS Cloud and need to replicate between these two systems. Kindly help us to configure the replication so that automatically sync these two system through replication job like PERSON_NAME Replication. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Replication is required between MaxDB DMS OnPrem and...
entry.content:
From database point of view, you could follow the HowTo wiki below to setup Standby System.

HowTo - Standby System (Recovery from Log Backup)

The database 7.6 is too old which already out of support. I would recommend you to upgrade your database to the latest version which supports the auto log recovery.
1178367 - SAP MaxDB: End of Support Dates
SAP MaxDB 7.6 : December 31, 2016 （end-of-support date）


Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules

Hello ,

Great Blog. Is this functionality available in the Basic Credit Management or does it require additional license for Advanced Credit Management?

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: Re: \/SAPAPO/SDP94 issue - Initial column cannot be inserted
entry.content:
Hi Pothumudi,

Here is the spot where you can configure. T-Code /n/sapapo/sdp8b --> Edit View --> Data View Tab

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Exploring the Consequences of Removing Report Templates: Fonts, Attachments, UDF Values, ERP Errors
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're contemplating removing various report templates like fonts, attachments, UDF values, ERP errors, etc., which have been available since the start. What insights or advice do you have on the potential impacts of such a decision?

Regards,

Sakil Ahmed

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.09
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud brings together analytics and planning with unique integration to SAP applications and seamless access to heterogenous data sources. It helps everyone in your organization make decisions without doubt with trusted insights and integrated plans.

This blog post introduces the features of the SAP Analytics Cloud 2024.09 release available for SAP Analytics Cloud FastTrack customers. For SAP Analytics Cloud Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) customers, this release and its features will be available as part of the QRC Q3 2024 release. View the QRC release schedule here.

 

System Administration

 

Although not required, you may upgrade to the latest SAP Analytics Cloud agent version 1.0.403 to take advantage of all data acquisition types.

The agent’s minimum version remains at 1.0.75, with the following exceptions:

  • Version 1.0.99 for SAP ERP/SQL Database
  • Version 1.0.365 for SAP universe (UNX). The SAP Analytics Cloud agent requires additional setup steps, for more details see SAP Note 3262098
  • Version 1.0.353 for SAP Business Warehouse (BW)
  • Version 1.0.235 for SAP HANA View
  • Version 1.0.248 for File Server

For more information, see System Requirements and Technical Prerequisites.

Regarding supported features and required updates for the integration of SAP BW with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2541557 for further details.

Regarding supported features and required updates for live universe access through SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2771921 for further details.

Please download the latest version of the Simple Deployment Kit from Service Marketplace.

Note: To avoid downloading older versions and potentially exposing users to a vulnerable bundling of the Cloud Connector with SAPJVM, or Apache Tomcat, only the three latest versions of the kits are available to download.

For Cloud agent version change management details, refer to SAP Note 3264839.

 

Release Highlights

  • Data Integration
    • Enable credential sharing for IBP and Generic ODATA connections
  • Microsoft Office Integration
    • Add-in for Microsoft Excel
      • Support offline mode for cell-based formulas | (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Data Integration

 

Enable credential sharing for IBP and Generic ODATA connections

Users can now allow per-user credentials when creating and sharing new data acquisition connections for SAP Integrated Business Planning and generic OData Services data sources.

 

Microsoft Office Integration

 

Add-in for Microsoft Excel

 

Supporting offline mode for custom cell-based formulas (get and set data)

There is a new mode for workbooks that allow keeping the values for custom functions (also when changing sheet layout) when the end user is not connected to SAP Analytics Cloud or does not have the add-in. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

This blog post only provides a high-level overview of the latest features and enhancements of SAP Analytics Cloud. You can find more details on these features in your In-App Help Guide for FastTrack customers and see this SAP Knowledge Base Article if you’d like to learn more about FastTrack and Quarterly Release Cycle releases. 

If you have any questions regarding the content in this blog post, you can comment below. If you have product specific or technical questions, post a question to our SAP Analytics Cloud Questions & Answers forum. Visit our SAP Analytics Cloud Community pages to find more product information, best practices, and more. And check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to see more upcoming features of SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Unable to set a user defined values in image field
entry.content:
I have a user defined field of image type on AR Order window at line level. I need to setup a user defined value off a formatted search on this field however I cannot place the cursor in the field to activate Tools-customization tools - User defined values setup window ( or shift+alt+F2)

The cursor always changes to a hand icon on the field and you can only double click on it.

entry.title: Is it possible for Workflow to automatically escalate if position in Workflow is vacant?
entry.content: In SuccessFactors, I see how to set up Escalations if Workflows remain unapproved for nominated amount of days but am seeking way to automatically and immediately have task go to higher up manager (not normally in Workflow) if a position supposed to be an Approver in the workflow is Vacant.

entry.title: Re: CommonCryptoLib: TLS protocol versions and cipher suites

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData

entry.title: Data Replication Framework license
entry.content:
Hi team.

I need to replicate business partners, and for this I need to know this:
Does the "Data Replication Framework" tool require a license to use in S/4HANA 2021 systems?

Regards!

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules
entry.content:
Hi @priya_sshekhar,

It requires an additional license as of writing. Please refer to note 2696793 - Licensing of SAP Credit Management in SAP S/4HANA On Premise for more details.

Regards,
Darrel

entry.title: Extract Stories using the rest api in SAC trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP Analytics Cloud. Need to get the details of Stories and Models from SAP Analytics Cloud using the REST APIs in the trial account. So far I could see, from the documentation, we have the rest apis available and with OAUTH authentication, which needs Administrator option for OAUTH client. 

Is there any other option available to execute REST APIs in a trial account ? Any help in this regard would be helpful.

Thanks,

Sreedhar Rusuma

Huy Nguyen

If i copy the variant and rename it, the popup window wont show up. If you could help me how and where this configuration is maintained that will be of a great help.

Thank you in advance.

Vinay

entry.title: Re: Print custom page range from Crystal Report Viewer
entry.content: Hello Don, sorry for late reply. I cannot assign this problem to the drivers only. First of all, the print dialog I showed is Windows 11. I assume the dialog you showed is Windows 10, right? In the meantime, I did some more tests. I tested PDF printers (PDF24, PDF Creator), redirected printers (Kyocera) as well as a directly connected printer (Lexmark C3326dw). Except for the forwarded printer, I did all tests on Windows 10 and Windows 11. The problem only appears on Windows 11! And I wonder why it always works correctly with MS Office, for example.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Accounting and Tax Register
entry.content:
Hi

I am not sure, on what is the transaction code or fiori app you have used for the image Register.png

Ideally the input tax should not be part of asset capitalization, if you are using it as input tax credit. It should be used to offset the tax liability. So probably that is the reason, it may not be displayed. From the looks of the report it looks like a custom transaction or report 

Thanks & regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: My name is Sarath and I am from India. At this moment, This course will help me out to enhance my overall knowledge. SAP brings to the table as it's evident that we are highly skillful but because of economic crisis we aren't able to take advantage of many opportunities. I myself cannot afford the certification fee and has been waiting since an year now to have ample amount so as to do the certification in SAP CPI. If selected, I will definitely encourage more peoples my peers from India who in my knowledge are willing to work in SAP and need a little push to go and do their bit to help you people in this kind great initiative of providing free certification

entry.title: Re: Service Product Add on SD document.
entry.content: Thank you for your reply! Created the service product using T code - OISD that has attached customer service tasks list. That service product could be use at VA01 SD document. Our Financial Impact on SD document Customer Receivable - 100 DR Revenue - 80 CR (for inventory) Service Revenue - 20 CR (for service product) For Delivery Order Inventory items will be delivered to customers after completion of the Sale Order. For Service product we don’t create delivery but, can we want to create service notification using by sale order?

entry.title: Re: sapjco3: How to add certificate for SNC connection
entry.content:
Your question shows a basic misunderstanding. You do not add any SNC certificates to JCo, instead these are imported and managed by the respective SNC environment alone. JCo will never see the certificates themselves, that are used in SNC communication. JCo can only pass certificate subject names to an SNC library requesting which certificate the SNC library shall choose from its own PSE certificate store.

Hence, your question is more about configuring your PSE, not so much about configuring JCo. Please see KBA 2642538 for a short how-to description with using the SAP Common Cryptography Library as the SNC library of choice. This KBA is also linked from the JCo SDK JavaDoc at interface DestinationDataProvider.
For troubleshooting problems with PSE credentials, I recommend to have a look into KBA 1525059.

Furthermore, if using the SAP Common Crypto Library, I recommend not to specify JCO_SNC_MYNAME in JCo, but to let the Common Crypto Lib choose its default identity based on the OS user under which the Java process is currently running.
I hope that helps.

entry.title: Re: What is the preferred way of data fetch from HANA vie...

entry.title: Re: Production order number range
entry.content:
Hello BettyChu , 

Always follow steps to create new number range once existing one is exhausted also you can check with your technical consultant regarding automation on this area like when number range is going to exhaust , system should warn everyone via workflow emails that Number range going to exhaust soon , please extend it ASAP !

Let me know in case of further questions. Hope this is sufficient to answer your question.

entry.title: DMC:Value XX cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum XX digits error for custom field
entry.content:
Hello,

One of my project while tyring to migrate customer I got the error message "Value 10 cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum 1 digits." for a numeric custom field that has 3 intiger and 2 decimal digits in conversion phase. 

None of the Length of data in that field is exceeding the given value. By the way in migration template the intiger part and decimal part is written as 3 and 2 but when there is a value more than 1 digit it gives above error.

How can I solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Data Replication Framework license
entry.content: The Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP S/4HANA is typically included as part of the standard functionality and does not require a separate license for its basic usage. It's designed to facilitate data replication between SAP S/4HANA systems and other systems within the landscape.

entry.title: Re: Cannot generate a PDF after latest Microsoft Office u...
entry.content: Hey Shane, Thank you for your response. I am not using the cloud version. I have an enterprise subscription and the apps are installed on my authoring machine. This was working fine till last update and the issue is with Enable Now only. Rest all apps are working fine and I can save a PDF from MS word installed on my PC. I have tested this on multiple machines and have uninstalled an reinstalled office too.

entry.title: Re: Production order costs analysis before settlement
entry.content: Using COOIS, you can analyze costs incurred on a production order before it is settled. However, it's important to note that COOIS provides information on costs that have been posted to the order but not yet settled. For a more detailed analysis, you might also consider transaction codes such as CO03 or COOISPI, depending on your specific requirements and SAP configuration.

entry.title: Re: Vendor Grouping key not work
entry.content:
1. Check Configuration:

    • Ensure that the vendor grouping key functionality is activated and configured properly in your SAP system. This configuration is typically done in the Financial Accounting (FI) module under Accounts Payable settings.
    • Verify that you have defined the vendor grouping key and assigned the appropriate criteria such as company code, fiscal year, and payment method.

  2. Review Vendor Master Data:

    • Check the vendor master records to ensure that the vendors you're trying to group together have the same vendor grouping key maintained in their master data. The grouping key should be identical for all vendors you want to combine for payment.

  3. Payment Run Parameters:

    • When executing the payment run, ensure that you select the correct payment method and specify the grouping criteria (company code, fiscal year, payment method). The payment program will use these criteria to determine which invoices to include in the payment document.

  4. Simulation and Analysis:

    • Before executing the actual payment run, consider running a simulation to review which invoices are selected for payment based on the grouping criteria. This can help identify any discrepancies or issues in the selection process.

  5. Check Payment Log:

    • After executing the payment run, review the payment log or payment document to see if the invoices were grouped together as expected. The payment document should reflect the grouping key criteria you specified.

  6. Consult with SAP Expertise:

    • If you're still encountering issues despite checking the above steps, consider consulting with an SAP expert or your organization's SAP support team. They can provide further guidance and assistance in troubleshooting and resolving the issue.

entry.title: SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER
entry.content:
SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER :

Number which is assigned apart from the material number in SAP MM in order to differentiate
between individual pieces and other material items. The combination of material number and serial number
is unique.

Serialized Inventory: 

Serialized Inventory is the tracking of individual units using Unique Serial Numbers. Serial Numbers are differentiated from SKU (Stock Keeping Unit). 

  • SKU Numbers Identify the type of Product while Serial Numbers identify one Specific item or a part of an item.

    Configuration Steps:
    1. Serial number profile configuration. (OIS2)
    2. Assign serial number profile to material master (MM01/MM02) under plant data /
    storage location 2 view.


    SERIAL NUMBER PROFILE CONFIGURATION
    Path: (SPRO → SAP Ref IMG → Materials Management → Purchasing) or OLME → Serial Numbers →
    Determine serial number profiles

     

     

    Important Settings in serial number profile configuration
    ➢ Serial Number Existence Requirement: Indicator that determines whether the serial numbers
    entered for a business transaction need to be created first as a master record in the system.

    • If the indicator is set, the serial numbers must be created first as a master record in the system.
    • If the indicator is not set, the serial numbers are created during a business transaction

    Equipment category:

    It is used to categories your equipment according to broad criteria, such as we
    have used it as Electrical equipment, Mechanical equipment, Instrumentation equipment, PRT
    (production resources tool), Vehicles, also some category where material serial no. functionality is
    used.

    Stock Check for Serial Numbers: This indicator states whether the system should perform a stock
    check during serial number assignment. If it should, it also establishes with what type of notification
    (warning or error) the system reacts in the event of stock inconsistencies with Inventory
    Management.

    Serializing Procedures: 

    It is a four-digit identification code which describes a serialization Procedure. Define on the business requirement you can set different scenarios for a serial number profile. 

    Select the line item of the serial number profile and click on the Serializing Procedure.

    MMSL and POSL Procedure is the standard one from MM side. 

     SerUsage (Serial number usage)
    Indicator that determines for a business transaction, whether
    ▪ No serial numbers are assigned
    ▪ Serial numbers can be assigned
    ▪ Serial numbers must be assigned
    ▪ Serial numbers are assigned automatically


    Dependencies
    If the serial numbers are automatically assigned during a transaction, the dialog box for
    creating serial numbers is not be displayed.

     

    Eqreq (Equipment Requirement) 

    Entry that determines whether or not an equipment master record should be created for each number when assigned Serial Numbers. 

    Use: 

  • If you choose the indicator “Default: Without Equipment”, the user can later decide when assigning serial numbers in the dialog box, whether an equipment master record still be created. 
    • If you choose the indicator “With Equipment” this is binding for the user. The indicator cannot be reset. 

      Central Control Parameters for Serial Numbers
      Path: (SPRO → SAP Ref IMG → Materials Management → Purchasing) or OLME → Serial Numbers →
      Central Control Parameters for Serial Numbers
      In this step, you define a central default equipment category for the serial number management.
      This equipment category is proposed by the system if the system cannot find an equipment category in
      the serial number profile for a serialization operation.
      Note: If you create master records for serial numbers manually the system automatically proposes the
      default equipment categories defined here. The internal number range of the equipment category you
      selected is copied automatically.
       Serial number range (Internal Number Assignment)
      Number that determines how documents are to be numbered by the system. It indicates
      which number range is relevant for a document type.
      The numbers assigned via this setting are irrelevant for actual serial number management,
      since you work with serial numbers or material numbers in the application transactions. The
      numbers assigned here, however, are keys for the equipment file, as a basic equipment
      master record is created in the background for each serial number.
      For this reason, the internal number range of the selected equipment category will be
      proposed.

      Create the Serial Number in Transaction code in IQ01: 

      The Initial Screen Appears like 

      By Entering the Material Number and Category click on the Existing Serial Number list tab as shown. 

      In this Transaction we can create serial numbers manually one by one. 

      Stock Type is the Mandatory field. (I.e., Unrestricted use or Quality or Blocked) 

      By Maintaining all the data click on the save data. 

      Thankyou.

       

       

       

       

       

  •

entry.title: iOS builidng error
entry.content:
Hi to everyone

I have this error constantly when trying to build an iOS version. At android version I hadn`t any problem…

I believe that now my certificates are okay,
but please I accept any kind of help because as it is, it is impossible to locate the problem.

Thank you very much!

 

Runtime version: 4.9.218;
AB version: 2.1.14
COMMAND:

npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-72867\""

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-72867\""

entry.title: Re: Systemcopy sap QAS longTime
entry.content:
Hi 

You follow the steps as mentioned in the SAP portal link a simple backup and restore method.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SLTOOLSET/62eb9f365f464802be11f7869069750c/b076fbcd92e84f49b540ac58958f4cd4.html?version=CURRENT_VERSION

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Customization in PP module
entry.content:
Hello @berk_abay

Greetings of the day !

I am trying best to answer this query , you might get all details in older SAP community posts related to this questions , but you have to search it accordingly.

Customization Areas in SAP PP :

Material Types /MRP Strategies /MRP Types /Lot Sizes /Customized Prod. Order Types also you can do customization in Material Creation and BOM Creation Tcodes using custom Programs.

You can change print control of Prod. orders using custom program.

Even some of companies have their customization over MPS/MRP as well as Prod. Order Execution Process based on customized transactions , so basically they never use std. tcodes for Planning as well as Shop floor execution.

For Non Customization --> Most of the areas you can do customization , in case of area where SAP defined std. rules that has to be std. then you cant make customization.

like Std value keys can be defined as 6 only in Work center.

For SAP PP Tables : You can get SAP PP tables over internet , with use of some technical changes , you can add custom fields in std. tables but again scope is limited , its not possible for every SAP PP tables.

entry.title: Re: Vendor Grouping key not work
entry.content: Hi, I try to use company code, fiscal year, and item text as grouping key and assign them to all vendor masters. However, I found that grouping key works well to combine or separate all opened items under the same vendor code. But it is not work for multiple vendor codes which means the vendor code is still the highest level to control the payment document splitting in F110.

entry.title: Re: Special GL account i use A and F its showing the error
entry.content:
1. Configuration Issues:

    • Check if the special GL indicators A and F are correctly configured in your SAP system. Verify that the settings for these special GL indicators are consistent with your business requirements.
    • Ensure that the relevant customizing settings for special GL accounts (transaction code: FSP0) are maintained correctly, including assignment of reconciliation accounts, automatic postings, and other relevant settings.

  2. Authorization Issues:

    • Make sure that the user executing the transaction has the necessary authorizations to use special GL accounts and perform the required transactions. Check the user roles and authorizations to ensure they include access to special GL functionality.

  3. Data Entry Errors:

    • Double-check the data entered when posting transactions involving special GL accounts. Ensure that the correct special GL indicator (A or F) is selected and that all other relevant fields are filled in accurately.
    • Verify that the special GL account numbers being used exist in the system and are assigned to the appropriate reconciliation accounts.

entry.title: Mass Asset Retirement by using Worklist
entry.content:
Go to T-code: S_ALR_87011963 (or AR01). Enter asset numbers which you want to proceed and execute report:

Note: You can enter mass assets by using “Multiple selection” () and pressing “Upload from Clipboard” (😞

Review asset list and create Work List:

 Write WL name and Choose “Retirement without revenue” for ABAVN t-code:

Enter Values for mass Asset retirement and press OK:

Result:

Go to t-code AR31:

Choose new created WL and Execute:

After Execution review asset list and press “Release Button”:

Result:

Re-execute report (AR31) and check ‘Work Item Status”:

T-code AW01N to see result:

entry.title: SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER:
entry.content:
SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER:

Definition: Number which is assigned apart from the material number in SAP MM in order to differentiate
between individual pieces and other material items. The combination of material number and serial number
is unique.


Serialized inventory is the tracking of individual units using unique serial numbers. Serial numbers are
different from SKU numbers. SKU numbers identify a type of product while serial numbers identify one
specific item or a part of an item.

entry.title: Re: CF Deployment Error: Error getting tenant t0
entry.content:
The solution would be to omit the second Service Manager, but this is not an option for me as I use it to register the Service Broker on the BTP.

So I will probably have to open a ticket.

entry.title: Re: Unable to set a user defined values in image field
entry.content:
Hi,

To my knowledge this is not possible without an addon. The best alternative is to create a link type field. There you can create a formatted search, but it would not bring the image to the document.

However, with this solution you could look into using crystal reports to actually open/print the image from the link. The principle is described in the answer to this question.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content: The one liner formula seems interesting! Thanks for the tips Daniel.

entry.title: KPI Creation in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Go to Launchpad Designer (t-code: /UI2/FLPD_CUST)

1) Create Fiori Z-catalog

To Create Z catalog

Click on “+”:    

Fill in Tile and ID fields and press “Save”:

Copy target mapping from existing catalog (or create manually). To copy select existing catalog and go to “Target Mapping”:

Select Semantic Object and press “Create Reference”:

Select your catalog:

System will show info message:

2) Assign authorization to user to access this Z-catalog:

Go to SAP GUI transaction PFCG. Specify new authorization role name and press single role:

Populate description name field and save the role:

Go to Tab “Menu”, select “Transaction”(insert Node) -> SAP FIORI Tile Catalog:

Select created Z-catalog ID in Catalog ID field:

Press “Continue”:

To add user go to Tab “User”, put user ID:

Save changes:

3) To create KPI go to FIORI APP CREATE KPI

Specify KPI Title:

Scroll down and specify data source (select from list of values):

Press “Activate and Add Evaluation”. System will ask to specify Customizing Request Nr. (select relevant form the list, if there is no one, create in transaction SE01):

Specify Evaluation name:

 

Scroll down and specify Input Parameters:

Scroll down and specify Filters (select Optional Filters to add more filters):

Specify KPI Goal Type:

Specify Target, Thresholds and Trends (if needed). Press “Activate and Configure Tile”:

System will ask to specify Workbench Request Nr. and Package (select relevant form the list, if there is no one, create in transaction SE01):

Select Tile format:

Make Tile Configuration based on your needs:

Go to Save and Configure  Drill-Down:

Select Dimensions and Measure and press “OK”:

Make additional adjustments in necessary and press “OK”:

4) Add created KPI to Fiori Launchpad.

Go to Me Area and select Edit Home Page:

Select “+ Add Group”:

Enter Group name and press “+”:

Search for created catalog and pin KPI to the Fiori Launchpad:

Go back and exit edit mode:

New Catalog and KPI now are available for a user:

entry.title: Limit of Locations per Location Group
entry.content:
Does anybody know if there is a limit on the number of Locations that can be associated to one Location Group in SF Employee Central?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation -Unable to add Attended...
entry.content:
Hello Experts

 

Any comments with respect to the below query ?

entry.title: Re: SERIAL NUMBER IN MATERIAL MASTER:
entry.content:
In SAP, the material master record is a key data entity that contains all the information related to a material. It includes details such as material description, storage locations, purchasing information, and more. If you're looking to assign a serial number to a material in the material master record, you can follow these steps:

  1. Access Material Master Transaction (MM01/MM02/MM03): Depending on whether you want to create a new material, modify an existing one, or just view the details, you'll use one of these transactions.

  2. Enter Material Number or Create New: If you're creating a new material, enter the material number you want to assign the serial number to. If you're modifying an existing material, find and select the material you want to update.

  3. Navigate to "Serial Number" Tab: In the material master screen, navigate to the "Serial Number" tab. This tab may be labeled differently depending on your SAP configuration or version.

  4. For more information connect with us at kodehash Technologies.

entry.title: Re: Account 895000 requires an assignment to a CO object.
entry.content:
Hi @Renusri_21 

Seem to be related to variances. You could maintain OKB9 for the same.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Unable to set a user defined values in image field
entry.content: I have a customer database done by a previous partner that has implemented this ( formatted search on a image user defined field ), so is the reason for asking the question . Now we need to implement this on another database at the same customer site ( on customers request ) - so far I too cannot see a way to do this without directly writing into Business One tables - ( which seems how the previous partner may have done ??) - however I do not want to do a direct write - it will void SAP support.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA CLOUD 2202将彻底弃用项目控制器（CJ20N）
entry.content:
@Abu_Monk 我没查到关于项目Settelment Rule的API，我建议您提个CIP：

All Improvement Request Lists - Customer Influence (sap.com)来创建需求
